shared_properties: Pointed head crest, eye slit, and trailing lower body silhouette.
differences: Stride opens into a longer leg spread with a 10 px rear trail.
Lower body vapor stretches backward to show speed.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra silhouette, limb taper, eye glow placement, and cloak-like vapor edge anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle on the existing UmbraActor entity and switch to this loop when horizontal input magnitude is above the walk threshold.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_umbra_run_8f_10fps.png through AssetServer and map it to the run state inside the player animation resource.
runtime_notes: Run loop plays at 10 fps and can mirror on the X axis instead of storing a second facing atlas.
Rear foot contact frame stays consistent with dustless shadow traversal rather than physical ground debris.
Pivot remains aligned to the idle state rear foot midpoint.

context.usage: Fast shadow path traversal used when the player commits to a beam opening or clears a scale before the moving light returns.

shape.silhouette: Forward driven shadow form with stretched leading arm, long trailing vapor, and a narrow low profile suited for darting through safe lanes.

appendages.accessories: Gold chest sigil retained on the upper torso.

specs.texture: Smooth silhouette fill with a slightly brighter trail edge on the rear hem.
specs.shading: Deep black core with thin teal streaks on the rear trail and one bright eye cut.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 256x48 px with eight 32x48 frames.
The forward lean never exceeds 4 px from the idle torso center so hitbox placement stays stable.
Rear trail length stays between 6 px and 10 px in every frame and never clips the 32x48 frame bounds.
